evidence_summary: The sequence must capture the pivot from atmospheric despair to high-stakes kinetic action. Production must facilitate a transition from the grounded, heavy atmosphere of the Palace/Hangar to a high-speed aerial flight through a thinning Martian sky, requir...

In a moment of clarity amidst the thinning air, John Carter remembers the nine "thought waves" needed to operate the plant. He strips an air-scout machine of all weight and launches into a high-speed, desperate flight through the dying atmosphere.
Extreme wide shots (scout machine vs. vast sky)
